# Knight
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Knight&prop=wikitext

{{Classbox
| desc = The knight fights at close range, wears very heavy armor, and uses his shield to stun enemies.
| weaponSlot = Sword
| weapon = Short Sword
| abilitySlot = Shield
| ability = Wooden Shield
| armor = HeavyArmor
| armorLink = Heavy Armors

| hpStart = 250
| hpLevel = 20 - 30
| hpCap = 855

| mpStart = 100
| mpLevel = 2 - 8
| mpCap = 252

| attStart = 15
| attLevel = 1 - 2
| attCap = 50

| defStart = 0
| defLevel = 0
| defCap = 45

| spdStart = 7
| spdLevel = 0 - 2
| spdCap = 50

| dexStart = 10
| dexLevel = 0 - 2
| dexCap = 50

| vitStart = 10
| vitLevel = 1 - 2
| vitCap = 75

| wisStart = 10
| wisLevel = 0 - 2
| wisCap = 50
}}

The Knight uses the '''Shield''', making it very popular. PStunning (Permanently Stunning) is very popular among [https://rotfserver.fandom.com/wiki/Galactic_Zones galaxies] especially, making them very easy and less dangerous. Rotf has added many new [https://rotfserver.fandom.com/wiki/Shields shields] to the game.
